race.comment: SNEAKY SUNRISE (3) proved far too strong for AHHA AHHA (9) when they met at Caulfield last time out, SNEAKY SUNRISE given a good ride there to track the pace but she came right away to score convincingly. She sets up very well here and can repeat the dose. AHHA AHHA seemed hardly interested back in the field there before warming up very late to grab second in a tight go. If she can get involved earlier and hold a spot she can turn the tables. MOMETZ (5) has won two on the bounce over a mile, getting the job done by a nose last time. He'll concede a start again but has claims. ASTRAL FLAME (8) bounced back to form with a solid win in BM70 company at Cranbourne and drops 4.5kg off that. Expect she takes catching. HOT DIGITY BOOM (7) is off a tidy win at 1400m - this trip is some risk but he maps for every chance.
